pr.title: feat: extend uploadFile to string[] and add steps.dropFiles
pr.summary: uploadFile now accepts string | string[], enabling multi-file attachment in a single call. A new dropFiles method simulates file drag-and-drop by dispatching dragenter, dragover, and drop events with a populated DataTransfer — no real file read required. Both methods are exposed on Steps (steps.uploadFile / steps.dropFiles) and on the fluent chain (steps.on(...).uploadFile / steps.on(...).dropFiles). The underlying WebElement.dropFiles is intentionally web-only and not added to the Element interface.

build.knownFailures: Full suite run against GitHub Pages app (civitas-cerebrum.github.io/vue-test-app). Build is clean; live test run pending CI.

docs.readmeUpdatedReason: New public methods uploadFile (signature change) and dropFiles added to the Interaction section.
docs.apiReferenceUpdatedReason: Both Steps and fluent-chain examples added to api-reference.md Interaction section.
docs.skillFilesUpdatedReason: No workflow stage or contribution rule changed.
